yesterday_summary.data:
# 2026-02-28 Daily Memory

## Decisions
- 로컬 LLM 직결 안정화는 계속 진행하기로 결정(서버 정상, OpenClaw 라우팅 불안정 구간 해결 우선).
- 보안 운영 원칙 재확정: 평문 키 금지, `secrets audit → configure → apply → reload` 절차 준수.
- 친구의 분산 AI 인프라(로컬+클라우드 하이브리드) 구성안은 보안/운영 관점으로 검토하기로 함.

## State Changes
- X 링크 4건 요약/캡처 완료:

top_headlines.title: Polymarket Iran Bets Hit $529 Million as New Wallets Draw Notice
top_headlines.summary: As US and Israeli bombs fell on Iran this weekend, bettors on Polymarket — where $529 million was traded on contracts tied to the timing of the strikes — were cashing in. Almost immediately, blockchain sleuths began hunting for unusual patterns in recent bets.

top_headlines.title: US Job Growth Seen Moderating After Robust January
top_headlines.summary: US payrolls growth probably settled back in February after the strongest month of hiring in a year, returning to a more moderate and likely sustainable pace of hiring.

top_headlines.title: What’s at Stake for Oil Markets as Trump Strikes Iran
top_headlines.summary: President Donald Trump’s decision to strike Iran creates new risks for a significant chunk of the world’s oil supply.

ai_tech.title: Private Credit Stocks Signal More Pain Is Coming: Credit Weekly
ai_tech.summary: Falling income, slashed dividends and loan markdowns: the results from some of the most transparent private credit funds this week have done little to soothe investors concerned about cockroaches in the market.
